trades.reasoning: Only candidate today scoring 100 with all four confirmation signals: RSI in bullish zone (68.5), MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge — the single clearest institutional participation signal in the screener.

decisions.briefing: Markets are in moderate risk-on mode with NASDAQ +1.2% and S&P +0.7% — not a blowout day, but a solid risk-on setup. Per strategy memory, the right call is to deploy remaining cash on the first genuine risk-on signal after holding through neutral days. PS is the standout: it's the only ticker with all four confirmation signals including the critical volume surge, separating it from the 11 other score-95 candidates that lack institutional participation evidence. Deploying available cash into PS to occupy one of four open slots.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities climbed Monday with the NASDAQ leading at +1.2% and the S&P 500 adding 0.7%, as investor appetite for growth and technology names remained strong heading into the second half of 2026. Macro conditions stayed supportive with no fresh hawkish signals from the Fed, allowing momentum in AI infrastructure and semiconductor-adjacent names to continue building. Breadth was positive across sectors, with small- and mid-cap growth stocks joining large caps in the rally.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股周一全線上揚，納斯達克指數領漲，升幅達1.2%，標普500指數亦上升0.7%，反映投資者對成長股及科技板塊的熱情在進入2026年下半年後持續高漲。宏觀環境維持有利，聯儲局未釋出新的鷹派訊號，令人工智能基礎建設及半導體相關個股的動能得以延續。市場廣度正面，中小型成長股與大型股同步上揚，市場情緒穩定。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Volume confirmation means a stock's price move is supported by unusually high trading volume — typically more than 1.5x its 20-day average. When institutions (mutual funds, hedge funds) buy heavily, they generate large volume that shows up as a 'surge.' A price breakout on high volume is far more likely to sustain than one on thin volume, because it signals real demand, not just a temporary spike. PS triggered this signal today, which is why it scored 100 while other bullish candidates scored only 95.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量確認是指股價的上升走勢伴隨著異常高的交易量——通常超過20日均量的1.5倍。當機構投資者（如共同基金、對沖基金）大舉買入時，會產生大量成交，形成「成交量激增」的信號。在高成交量配合下的突破，遠比縮量上漲更具持續性，因為這代表真實需求，而非短暫拉升。PS今日觸發此信號，這正是它獲得100分、而其他看漲候選股僅得95分的關鍵所在。
